dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9626 IH: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to eliminate the State and local tax deduction marriage penalty.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Gottheimer introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Ways and Means

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to eliminate the State and local tax deduction marriage penalty.

section.header: Elimination of State and local tax deduction marriage penalty

subsection.text: Section 164(b)(7)(A)(ii) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by striking 2026, $40,400, and inserting the following:

subclause.text: except as provided in subclauses (II) and (III), $40,400,
in the case of a joint return, 200 percent of the dollar amount under subclause (I), and
in the case of a married individual filing a separate return, 50 percent of the dollar amount under subclause (I),

subsection.header: Modified adjusted gross income threshold amount
subsection.text: Section 164(b)(7)(B)(ii)(II) of such Code is amended by striking 2026, $505,000, and and inserting the following:

subclause.text: except as provided in subitems (bb) and (cc), $505,000,
in the case of a joint return, 200 percent of the dollar amount under subitem (aa), and
in the case of a married individual filing a separate return, 50 percent of the dollar amount under subitem (aa), and

paragraph.text: Subparagraphs (A)(iii) and (B)(ii)(III) of section 164(b)(7) of such Code are each amended—

subparagraph.text: by inserting with respect to the filling status of the taxpayer for the taxable year, before 101 percent, and
by inserting , with respect to such filing status, after in effect.

paragraph.text: Section 164(b)(6)(B) of such Code is amended by striking (half the applicable limitation amount in the case of a married individual filing a separate return).
Section 164(b)(7)(A)(iv) of such Code is amended by inserting (half such amount in the case of a married individual filing a separate return).
Section 164(b)(7)(B)(i) of such Code is amended by striking (half the threshold amount in the case of a married individual filing a separate return).

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall apply to taxable years beginning after December 31, 2026.
